title: Add html content to a doc block
excerpt:
Hello all, 
Is it possible to render html content when calling to addDocBlock method of the api? I’d like to add a button for example as data content for the block. 
Thanks, 
Gorka.

posts.author: gorkagallo (Gorka)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all,

Is it possible to render html content when calling to addDocBlock method of the api? I’d like to add a button for example as data content for the block.

Thanks,

Gorka.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @gorkagallo and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today, we don’t have block types that support rendering HTML.

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: gorkagallo (Gorka)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @Matias.Monday ,

I have another question for workdocs feature… You don’t have any kind of event when the workdocs is updated by the user, right?

Cheers,

Gorka.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Gorka:

You don’t have any kind of event when the workdocs is updated by the user, right?

Hello again,

No. We do not have any webhooks for it at the moment.

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: idna (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Matias.Monday Any plans this will be implemented in the future?

Or for example enabling to embed iframes into workdocs would unleash a lot of potential for customizations.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request webhook when something changes in a workdoc: monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request to allow iframe in workdoc: monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @idna,

I have created two requests for our team. One for the iframe suggestion and one for the webhook.

There are no ETAs at the moment so I would not count on it happening soon, but the requests are there and our team will take a look into it!

Cheers,
Matias
